product_name: UBS Sustainable Development Bank Bonds 5-10 UCITS ETF
target_client: Income-oriented wealth and institutional investors seeking high-quality development-bank debt
description: Fixed income ETF focused on medium-duration bonds issued by multilateral development banks. It offers exposure to high-quality 5-10 year debt and adds a sustainability-linked bond building block to wealth portfolios.

product_name: Schwab Mortgage-Backed Securities ETF (SMBS)
target_client: Investors seeking low-cost agency MBS exposure
description: Passive ETF tracking a benchmark of investment-grade mortgage-backed securities issued and/or guaranteed by U.S. government agencies. It is positioned as a low-cost fixed-income building block.

product_name: Fidelity Enhanced Emerging Markets ETF (FEMR)
target_client: Investors seeking quantitative active EM equity exposure
description: Actively managed emerging-markets equity ETF in Fidelity’s Enhanced suite. It applies quantitative factor analysis and active portfolio construction to an EM universe.

product_name: Fidelity Enhanced U.S. All-Cap Equity ETF (FEAC)
target_client: Investors seeking factor-aware active U.S. equity exposure
description: One of Fidelity’s new actively managed equity ETFs in the Enhanced suite. The strategy uses quantitative signals such as valuation, growth, profitability, management signals and sentiment in portfolio construction.

product_name: Goldman Sachs U.S. Large Cap Buffer 1 ETF (GBXA)
target_client: Advisors and investors seeking capped upside with downside buffering over a 3-month outcome period
description: Defined-outcome ETF tied to U.S. large-cap equities with an options-based structure intended to provide equity participation up to a cap with a set downside buffer. It was the first fund in Goldman’s three-part buffer ETF suite.

product_name: Goldman Sachs EUR Investment Grade Corporate Bond Active UCITS ETF (GIGE)
target_client: Advisors and wealth clients seeking actively managed euro IG corporate bond exposure
description: Active ETF focused on euro-denominated investment-grade corporate bonds. It launched alongside GIGU as part of Goldman’s first active ETF push in EMEA, combining active credit selection with ETF transparency and tradability.

product_name: Goldman Sachs USD Investment Grade Corporate Bond Active UCITS ETF (GIGU)
target_client: Advisors and wealth clients seeking actively managed U.S. investment-grade bond exposure
description: Active bond ETF investing primarily in U.S. dollar-denominated investment-grade corporate bonds. The launch marked Goldman’s entry into active fixed-income ETFs in EMEA and positioned the firm for advisor demand for active wrappers.

product_name: Goldman Sachs U.S. Large Cap Buffer 2 ETF (GBXB)
target_client: Advisors and investors seeking staggered buffered-outcome exposure
description: Second launch in Goldman’s buffer ETF lineup, giving advisors another entry point in the rolling defined-outcome schedule. The structure seeks long-term capital appreciation with a buffered loss profile and capped upside.

product_name: Schwab Core Bond ETF (SCCR)
target_client: Investors seeking a low-cost core bond allocation
description: Active core bond ETF that invests across U.S. dollar-denominated investment-grade sectors including corporates, taxable munis, mortgage-backed securities, ABS and Treasuries. It is meant to serve as a core bond sleeve.

product_name: JPMorgan Flexible Income ETF (JFLI)
target_client: Retail investors and financial advisors seeking diversified income
description: Active multi-asset income ETF combining roughly 75% global equity and 25% core fixed income. Designed to target a 6–8% yield while still allowing for capital appreciation.

product_name: Goldman Sachs U.S. Large Cap Buffer 3 ETF (GBXC)
target_client: Advisors and investors seeking buffered exposure with a third outcome start date
description: Third fund in Goldman’s active buffered ETF suite, expanding the firm’s defined-outcome menu for advisors. It pairs equity upside participation up to a cap with a stated downside buffer over a specified outcome period.

product_name: Edward Jones Generations
target_client: U.S. high-net-worth clients with $10 million+ in investable assets
description: Edward Jones Generations is the firm’s first private client service for U.S. high-net-worth investors. It bundles advanced planning, broader product access, dedicated support, and an elevated service model to deepen the firm’s appeal in the affluent segment.

product_name: G-PE Fund
target_client: Qualified and high-net-worth investors seeking private-equity access
min_investment: Not publicly disclosed; qualified investors only
description: Goldman’s G-PE fund is an evergreen private equity strategy that gives investors access across flagship buyout, growth, secondaries, and co-investment strategies. It is part of the firm’s G-Series push to widen private-markets access for wealth clients.

product_name: Fidelity Municipal Bond Opportunities ETF (FMUB)
target_client: Tax-sensitive investors and advisors seeking alpha-oriented muni exposure
description: Actively managed municipal bond ETF seeking total return and federal tax-exempt income. It gives Fidelity another actively managed tax-aware bond option in ETF form.

product_name: Fidelity Systematic Municipal Bond Index ETF (FMUN)
target_client: Cost-conscious investors seeking core municipal exposure
description: Low-cost, systematic municipal bond ETF intended as a core tax-exempt bond allocation. It uses Fidelity’s rules-based municipal index approach rather than a discretionary active process.

product_name: Edward Jones Advisory Solutions UMA - private real estate alternatives
product_structure: Alternative sleeve within unified managed account
target_client: Eligible Edward Jones Generations clients
min_investment: Generations clients; generally $10 million+ investable assets
fees: Advisory and underlying manager fees not publicly disclosed
description: Edward Jones expanded its high-net-worth alternative lineup with private real estate options delivered through the Advisory Solutions UMA. The addition supports the firm’s push to offer a fuller private-markets menu to affluent households.

product_name: Edward Jones Advisory Solutions UMA - private equity alternatives
product_structure: Alternative sleeve within unified managed account
target_client: Eligible Edward Jones Generations clients
min_investment: Generations clients; generally $10 million+ investable assets
fees: Advisory and underlying manager fees not publicly disclosed
description: Edward Jones opened private equity alternatives to eligible Generations clients through its Advisory Solutions unified managed account platform. The launch is part of the firm’s broader move to bring private-market access into wealth portfolios for affluent clients.

product_name: Edward Jones Advisory Solutions UMA - private credit alternatives
product_structure: Alternative sleeve within unified managed account
target_client: Eligible Edward Jones Generations clients
min_investment: Generations clients; generally $10 million+ investable assets
fees: Advisory and underlying manager fees not publicly disclosed
description: Edward Jones added private credit options to the Advisory Solutions UMA for high-net-worth Generations clients. The offering gives advisors another private-markets sleeve aimed at diversification and income enhancement within fee-based managed accounts.

product_name: Fidelity Managed Futures ETF (FFUT)
target_client: Investors seeking portfolio diversification through managed futures
description: Systematic liquid-alternatives ETF that takes long and short futures positions to capitalize on market trends. Fidelity markets it as a diversifier for traditional stock/bond portfolios.

product_name: JPMorgan Active High Yield ETF (JPHY)
target_client: Advisors and investors seeking active high-yield exposure in ETF form
description: Active high-yield bond ETF that brings JPMorgan’s flagship high-yield capability into an ETF wrapper. The launch was anchored by a $2 billion institutional seed investment.

product_name: Eaton Vance Mortgage Opportunities ETF (EVMO)
target_client: Investors seeking diversified mortgage and structured-credit exposure
description: Active securitized fixed-income ETF created through the conversion of Mortgage Securities Trust. The fund invests across agency and non-agency MBS, CMBS and other ABS markets.

product_name: JPMorgan Equity and Options ETF (JOYT)
target_client: Investors looking for a total-return-oriented options strategy
description: U.S. equity and options ETF in JPMorgan’s Equity Premium Income suite. It is positioned as a more total-return-oriented complement to income-focused options strategies like JEPI and JEPQ.

product_name: Personalized UMA alternatives capability
target_client: Qualifying wealth-management clients using Personalized UMA
min_investment: Qualified clients only; relatively high minimums not publicly disclosed
fees: Advisory and underlying manager fees not publicly disclosed
description: Wells Fargo added alternative investments as eligible holdings inside its Personalized Unified Managed Account program. The enhancement lets advisors manage traditional and alternative allocations inside a single account structure.

product_name: Alts Expanded Access Program
target_client: Ultra-high-net-worth Merrill and Private Bank clients
fees: Program/fund-level fees vary; not publicly disclosed
description: New alternatives access program that opens selected institutional-grade private market funds to qualified Merrill and Bank of America Private Bank clients. It is meant to extend private-market access beyond the firm’s core alts menu.

product_name: UBS MSCI USA ex Mega Cap UCITS ETF
target_client: Wealth and institutional investors seeking U.S. equity beta with less top-end concentration
description: Ex-mega-cap U.S. ETF that strips out the market’s largest constituents to provide more diversified core exposure. It can be paired with the mega-cap sleeve or used on its own to reduce concentration risk.

product_name: UBS MSCI USA Mega Cap UCITS ETF
target_client: Wealth and institutional investors seeking targeted exposure to the largest U.S. companies
description: U.S.-focused mega-cap ETF built for investors who want to isolate the biggest companies in the U.S. market. The launch responds to concentration driven by the largest technology and AI-linked stocks.

product_name: UBS MSCI World Mega Cap UCITS ETF
target_client: Wealth and institutional investors seeking dedicated mega-cap exposure
description: Passive ETF that carves out the largest MSCI World constituents into a dedicated mega-cap sleeve. It is designed to help advisors manage concentration risk separately from the rest of developed-market equity exposure.

product_name: UBS MSCI World ex Mega Cap UCITS ETF
target_client: Wealth and institutional investors seeking broader developed-market exposure with less mega-cap concentration
description: Companion ETF to the mega-cap sleeve that excludes the largest names in MSCI World. It gives allocators a way to rebuild global equity exposure with more control over concentration and diversification.

product_name: Proprietary Equity Income SMA in UMA Models
product_structure: Separately managed account within UMA Models advisory program
target_client: Eligible high-net-worth clients, with product additions aimed at clients with $5 million+ in investable assets
min_investment: Targeted to eligible HNW clients; $5 million+ noted for newest additions
description: Edward Jones expanded its SMA lineup through the Advisory Solutions UMA Models program with a proprietary Equity Income SMA. The launch fits the firm’s wider tax-aware and customizable product buildout for more affluent clients.

product_name: RJ Eagle Vertical Income ETF (RJVI)
asset_class: Multi-asset income / core fixed income alternative
target_client: Income-focused advisors and investors seeking diversified income with flexible multi-asset exposure
description: RJVI is positioned as a modern fixed income alternative that combines investment-grade bonds with preferred equity and dividend-paying equities. Raymond James launched it as part of its first active ETF lineup aimed at income generation and capital appreciation.

product_name: RJ Eagle GCM Dividend Select Income ETF (RJDI)
target_client: Income-oriented equity investors and advisors
description: RJDI is a U.S. large-cap equity income ETF focused on high-quality dividend-paying companies with strong fundamentals and shareholder-friendly capital return policies. It blends top-down sector views with bottom-up stock selection.

product_name: RJ Eagle Municipal Income ETF (RJMI)
target_client: Tax-sensitive income investors and advisors
description: RJMI is an actively managed municipal bond ETF designed to provide tax-advantaged income and long-term capital appreciation. The strategy emphasizes credit selection, risk-aware portfolio construction, and diversification across the municipal yield curve.

product_name: Goldman Sachs MSCI World Private Equity Return Tracker ETF (GTPE)
target_client: Advisors and investors seeking liquid, lower-cost access to private-equity-like returns
description: GTPE uses an MSCI index built from private-company data and publicly listed equities to approximate private equity-like returns in an ETF wrapper. It is positioned as a liquid alternative for wealth clients wanting private-market style exposure without traditional lockups.

product_name: Morgan Stanley Private Markets ELTIF
target_client: Eligible / professional wealth investors seeking private-market access
description: Semi-liquid private-markets ELTIF that invests across private equity, private credit and private real assets, with select public investments for liquidity management. It is designed to broaden private-markets access in a regulated wealth wrapper.

product_name: Eaton Vance Income Opportunities ETF (XAGG)
target_client: Investors seeking flexible non-core global fixed-income exposure
description: Active multisector bond ETF launched via conversion of the Morgan Stanley Income Opportunities Fund. It allocates flexibly across securitized credit, emerging-markets debt, high yield and loans.

product_name: UBS MSCI India Universal UCITS ETF
target_client: Wealth and institutional investors seeking India exposure with ESG and low-carbon tilts
description: Physical India ETF tracking the MSCI India Universal Low Carbon Select 5% Issuer Capped Index. The fund tilts toward companies with stronger and improving ESG profiles while excluding names that do not meet UBS’s climate and ESG criteria.

product_name: UBS MSCI India SF UCITS ETF
target_client: Wealth and institutional investors seeking broad India exposure
description: Synthetic ETF offering broad large- and mid-cap Indian equity exposure via the MSCI India Index. UBS highlighted the swap-based structure as potentially beneficial because synthetic ETFs are not currently subject to Indian capital gains tax.

product_name: Workplace Benefits Advised Pooled Employer Plan (PEP)
target_client: Small business owners and employers
description: New shared retirement-plan offering that lets multiple employers participate in a common plan. Merrill positions it as a way to reduce administrative burden while preserving flexible plan design.

product_name: Cash Balance Defined Benefit Plan with Merrill
target_client: Business owners and higher-saving employer-sponsored plan participants
description: New cash-balance plan offering designed to be paired with a 401(k). The structure is aimed at helping business owners and employees raise retirement contributions and reduce taxable income.

product_name: JPMorgan 100% U.S. Treasury Securities Money Market ETF (JMMF)
target_client: Cash investors seeking Treasury-only exposure with intraday tradability
description: Treasury-only money market ETF designed to follow SEC Rule 2a-7 liquidity requirements while offering weekly income distributions. It extends money-market exposure into an ETF wrapper.

product_name: My OnChain Net Yield Fund (MONY)
product_structure: Tokenized private placement money market fund
target_client: Qualified purchasers / accredited investors using Morgan Money
description: JPMorgan’s first tokenized money market fund, issued on Ethereum for qualified investors. The fund aims to pair traditional Treasury-backed cash management with blockchain-based transferability and settlement.

product_name: Goldman Sachs MSCI World Private Equity Return Tracker UCITS ETF (GSPE)
target_client: European advisors and wealth clients seeking liquid private-equity-like exposure
description: European UCITS follow-on to GTPE that packages private-equity-like index exposure in a listed ETF vehicle. The product expands Goldman’s private-market proxy strategy to cross-border wealth channels in Europe.

product_name: WIM internal proxy voting service
target_client: Clients whose assets are managed with both investment discretion and proxy-voting authority
description: Wells Fargo Wealth & Investment Management launched an in-house proxy voting service for eligible client assets. The move shifts voting to WIM’s own custom policy and positions stewardship as part of its broader investment service offering.

product_name: JPMorgan International Dynamic ETF (JIDE)
target_client: U.S. investors seeking active developed-markets equity exposure outside North America
description: Active international equity ETF focused on developed markets outside North America. The strategy uses bottom-up stock selection across Europe, Japan and Asia ex-North America.

product_name: Fidelity CLO ETF (FCLO)
target_client: Income investors seeking broader CLO tranche exposure
description: Active CLO ETF investing primarily in collateralized loan obligations rated BBB+ to B-. It offers a higher-spread complement to Fidelity’s AAA-only CLO launch.

product_name: Fidelity AAA CLO ETF (FAAA)
target_client: Fixed-income investors seeking high-quality CLO exposure
description: Active CLO ETF investing primarily in AAA-rated collateralized loan obligations. Fidelity positioned it as a diversified ETF entry point into the CLO market at a competitive fee.

product_name: Eaton Vance Preferred Securities and Income ETF (EVPF)
target_client: Income investors seeking tax-advantaged preferred-securities exposure
description: Active preferred-securities ETF focused on current income and after-tax yield potential. The strategy emphasizes research-driven security selection and securities that may generate qualified dividend income.

product_name: JPMorgan Equity Premium Yield ETF (ROCY)
target_client: Investors seeking equity exposure with derivative-based income
description: Active U.S. large-cap equity-income ETF that combines stock exposure with call-spread overlays. It expands JPMorgan’s derivative income suite for investors who want a lower-basis, yield-oriented alternative.

product_name: JPMorgan Nasdaq Equity Premium Yield ETF (ROCQ)
target_client: Investors seeking Nasdaq exposure with derivative-based income
description: Active Nasdaq-focused equity-income ETF that pairs growth-oriented equity exposure with call-spread overlays. It is designed for investors who want premium income without fully giving up upside participation.
